description: make sure that for the dev editor "movment editor" on click and drag of a poit we prevent camera click to pan until there is no point selected then we can pan again as long as no point is selected. currently when the user click ans drags a point it like kind moves then goes back and is weird so figure out what the issue is there and fix

Child Asset orphaning System: Need to implement a function (e.g., child.orphan()) that allows a parent custom controller to elevate a child asset to become a normal, independent asset. The default controller should have an on_orphaned() callback that handles the child's movement with realistic gravity calculations, causing it to fall straight down from its current 3D position until it hits the floor. Custom controllers can override this behavior with their own on_orphaned() implementations for specific behaviors.
